release_notes: 修復某些電腦上按下「停止」無法真正終止 ComfyUI 的問題
changes: 按下「停止」時會連同 ComfyUI 派生的所有子程序(torch DataLoader workers、ComfyUI-Manager 的 git/pip、自訂節點的輔助程序等)一起結束,避免父程序被殺後仍有子程序繼續佔用 8188 port
當 psutil 因防毒軟體 / UAC 權限無法讀取程序 cwd 而誤判「此 pid 不屬於此環境」時,若確認該 pid 仍是 port 的實際擁有者,會直接結束它並在 log 留下警告,不再靜默放過

en: Stop now also terminates every child process spawned by ComfyUI (torch DataLoader workers, ComfyUI-Manager's git/pip, custom-node helpers) so the port is no longer held by a surviving child after the parent is killed

When psutil cannot read a process's cwd due to AV/UAC restrictions and falsely concludes "this pid doesn't belong to this environment", Stop now verifies port ownership and kills the pid anyway if it is the actual listener — with a warning logged instead of silently refusing
zh-TW: 按下「停止」時會連同 ComfyUI 派生的所有子程序(torch DataLoader workers、ComfyUI-Manager 的 git/pip、自訂節點的輔助程序等)一起結束,避免父程序被殺後仍有子程序繼續佔用 8188 port
當 psutil 因防毒軟體 / UAC 權限無法讀取程序 cwd 而誤判「此 pid 不屬於此環境」時,若確認該 pid 仍是 port 的實際擁有者,會直接結束它並在 log 留下警告,不再靜默放過
